rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KWAI MUI LEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Remaining procedural issues include 1) If a will names a trust or trustee as a devisee, the trustee must be clearly identified in item 8. Where the personal representative and the sole trustee are the same person, or if there is no trustee, the beneficiaries of the trust must be clearly identified. Probate Code Section 1208(b) (San Francisco Local Rule 14.18.C.2). 2) All notices must include language about remote appearances (San Francisco Local Rule 14.1.C.6). Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ALDO PETER FIGONE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/8/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No 13100 declaration has been filed yet by the trustee of the post-deceased wife's trust. [LRSF 14.35 G.] This must be filed conventionally because of the original certified copy of the death certificate. (2) A petition for final distribution must state specifically how the estate is to be distributed by showing the distributee's name and description of the property, including the net amount of cash (as of a date certain) distributable to each beneficiary. [CRC 7.651; LRSF 14.35 I.6.] Fractional shares are not sufficient. Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 3/25/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. NB: In order for this Court to track closed matters, orders to terminate and distribute an estate must begin with the following language: "Order for Final Distribution." [LRSF 14.35 I.6.b.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LARRY DENNIS MENKE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required for failure to address Examiner's Notes. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WILLIAM A. GIBSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/2/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) A person seeking appointment as a fiduciary must sign and verify her own pleadings, including any supplement or amendment thereto. [CRC 7.103(c).] (2) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (Notice of Remote Appearance is NOT the notice to the interested parties about how THEY might appear remotely; it is only a notice to the Court that a party/attorney intends to appear remotely, which is not required in Probate in any event.) Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 3/19/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
